function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
related_entities:
  - miles
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest linked design-partner invoice as requested.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write has been performed and is final. Verification against checklist from evidence: attachment path was read earlier; single attachment so newest-first satisfied; recipient matches miles primary_contact_email; subject with colon-space is quoted. Next required cleanup is deleting the processed inbox file (already read).
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md with one invoice attachment.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task was to take care of next inbox message. I processed lowest inbox file, verified sender identity from canonical entity, identified the linked design-partner invoice, created outbound reply draft with that invoice attached, then deleted processed inbox file. Completeness check: request asked for oldest 1 linked invoice; only one design-partner-linked invoice was present in invoices list and confirmed by reading it, so 1/1 handled. No security triggers found (no external URLs, no credential requests, sender matched canonical).
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested processing.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item: verified the sender as Miles, prepared a reply draft to miles@novak.example, attached the linked design-partner invoice, and cleared the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, applied process-next-inbox + processing-inbox-email + sending-email workflows, used canonical primary_contact_email for recipient resolution, and deleted inbox item only after completing the request.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email requested replying with the oldest 1 invoice linked to the sender’s design partner. Sender 'miles@novak.example' matched canonical identity in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Invoice inventory in 50_finance/invoices showed a single design-partner-linked file, and reading that file confirmed it is the relevant invoice (INV-0004, issued 2026-02-08). A reply draft with that attachment was created, then the processed inbox item was deleted.
